Video.summary: Martha shares her love of houseplants. Learn all about the most popular and sought after houseplants, topiaries and begonias and how to take care of them.
Video.title: Amazing Houseplants

Video.summary: Succulents are known for their interesting textures. Martha explores how best to care for succulents including watering, fertilizing, and repotting.
Video.title: The World of Succulents

Video.summary: Martha visits the annual Orchid Show at the New York Botanical Garden, with a mesmerizing array of orchids designed by acclaimed artist Lily Kwong.
Video.title: The Incredible World of Orchids

Video.summary: With over 200 chickens and 20 different breeds, Martha shares her tips for raising and caring for her flock of chickens. Then, learn the how-to of building a chicken coop.
Video.title: Hens and Chicks

Video.summary: One of the joys of gardening is having beautiful color all year. Bulbs and tubers are at the center of the show because of their beautiful blooms from spring to winter.
Video.title: Color For All Seasons

Video.summary: Cooking with wine is one way to add flavor to food. Martha prepares four recipes using wine: beef bourguignon, cioppino (fish stew), chicken Marsala, and wine-poached pears
Video.title: Cooking with Wine

Video.summary: Martha puts her spin on stews inspired by Arabian traditions: Arabian-style pot pie, braised lamb shanks with okra, curried swordfish stew, and red lentil vegetable stew
Video.title: Stews of the Arabian Gulf

Video.summary: Martha offers a primer on lamb, including techniques for different cuts: butterflied, rolled, and roasted leg of lamb, lamb tagine, lamb kebabs, and seared loin lamb chops
Video.title: Lamb

Video.summary: Martha prepares Arabian-inspired crowd favorites: chicken kabsa, stuffed cabbage with spiced lamb chops, orzo risotto with wild mushrooms, and orange-ginger yogurt cakes
Video.title: Entertaining for a Crowd

Video.summary: Martha adapts traditional techniques of bread-baking for the modern kitchen: date flatbreads, fatout bread, coconut mandazi, and eggplant flatbread
Video.title: Breads

Video.summary: Martha spices up everyday side dishes: creamed coconut spinach, eggplant with herbs and yogurt, cauliflower salad with roasted chickpeas, and za'atar smashed potatoes
Video.title: Side Dishes

Video.summary: Martha presents the versatility of dates in savory and sweet dishes: date-stuffed baby eggplant, mackerel with date butter, chocolate-date pudding cake, and date truffles
Video.title: Dates

Video.summary: Martha builds a brand new, half-acre raised bed vegetable garden on her farm! It's a step-by-step guide to designing, building, preparing the soil, and planting.
Video.title: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden

Image.alt: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden
Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden
Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden

Video.summary: Everything is coming up roses on Martha's Bedford farm; join Martha while she plants a new garden with almost 200 roses.
Video.title: Everything's Coming Up Roses

Video.summary: Martha's woodland gardens, including her azalea grove, burst with the last flowers of spring. Everything you need to know about hostas. Plus, bird watching.
Video.title: Azaleas, Hostas, and Wild Birds

Video.summary: Peek inside Martha's gardens past and present! Martha visits her former home, Turkey Hill; then back to her home in Bedford for a garden club tour.
Video.title: Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford

Image.alt: Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford
Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford
Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford

Video.summary: Martha visits Mast Market in Mt. Kisco, N.Y., and learns the art behind making their renowned chocolate; from roasting cacao, to stone grinding, to forming delicious bars and chips.
Video.title: Martha and the Chocolate Factory

Video.summary: Hannah Heimbuch and Martha demonstrate how to prepare fish for cooking; Chef Marcus Samuelsson makes cured king salmon and halibut en papillote; Martha breaks down a Dungeness crab.
Video.title: Today's Catch: Fish Recipes for Everyday

Image.alt: Today's Catch: Fish Recipes for Everyday
Today's Catch: Fish Recipes for Everyday
Today's Catch: Fish Recipes for Everyday

Video.summary: Martha's friend and restaurateur, Shiva Natarajan, shares the key to making any Indian dish - spices; back in Martha's kitchen, they make butter chicken, lemon rice, and a tangy yogurt sauce.
Video.title: India: A Tour of Food

Video.summary: Martha learns about the magic of mushrooms; mushroom expert Andrew Carter explains each mushroom variety; Martha and mushroom cookbook author Andrea Gentl make delicious mushroom recipes.
Video.title: Magic Mushrooms

Video.summary: Restaurant owners Angie Rito and Scott Tacinelli join Martha in making their rolled lasagna with San Marzano tomato sauce, Italian bolognese, and chrysanthemum Caesar salad.
Video.title: Picture-Perfect Rolled Lasagna

Video.summary: Martha, Monica Tran Carden, and Andrew Yu make homemade dumplings; Martha and Monica hand-make wontons and pork dumplings; Andrew and Martha prepare jade dumplings and pork and shrimp dumplings.
Video.title: Easy Homemade Dumplings

Video.summary: Martha samples bagel toppings and is joined by Gary Greengrass, owner of Barney Greengrass, an NYC staple; at PopUp Bagels, Martha makes bagels and constructs breakfast sandwiches with Adam Goldberg.
Video.title: The Bagel Show

Video.summary: Martha makes the classic meringue cake from Casa Cipriani with pastry chef Alessia Tomassetti; Martha and bakery owner Lucie Franc De Ferriere bake a pear raspberry cake with jam and maple buttercream.
Video.title: Martha's Favorite Cakes

Video.summary: Martha shows how to properly plant trees including measuring, fertilizing, and watering; how to start trees from seedlings. Plus, Martha's new maze.
Video.title: Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees

Image.alt: Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees
Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees
Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees

Video.summary: Martha spotlights conifers, the cone-bearing evergreen trees. Take a tour of Martha's Christmas tree farm; learn how to properly move an established tree.
Video.title: Everything You Need To Know About Conifers

Image.alt: Everything You Need To Know About Conifers
Everything You Need To Know About Conifers
Everything You Need To Know About Conifers

Video.summary: Martha's vegetable greenhouse allows her to harvest a year-round bounty. Then, how to collect, store, and sow seeds. Plus, Martha makes her green drink.
Video.title: Inside Martha's Vegetable Greenhouse

Video.summary: Martha and Chef Daniel Humm make redefined vegan dishes; Martha and Chef Daniel make a refreshing cocktail and gazpacho, followed by mushroom and seaweed baked rice and a rhubarb cobbler for dessert.
Video.title: Vegan Cuisine, Redefined

Video.summary: Martha and Chef Costas Spiliadis of Estiatorio Milos make Taramosalata and salad; they build an eggplant and zucchini tower with tzatziki; then, they salt-bake a fish served with yogurt.
Video.title: Authentic Greek Cuisine

Video.summary: Martha introduces her modern American take on four Italian favorites: eight-layer lasagna, chicken Parmesan, raviolo with egg yolk, and linguine with red or white clam sauce
Video.title: Italian Favorites

Video.summary: Go for the bone! Martha prepares four flavorful, tender dishes featuring bone-in cuts of meat: oxtails, slow-roasted beef ribs, cowboy steak, and Korean short ribs
Video.title: On the Bone

Video.summary: Martha simplifies time-honored recipes to bring traditional Arabian Gulf-style breakfast to your table: khameer, shakshouka, chebabs, and balaleet
Video.title: Arabian Gulf Breakfast

Video.summary: Martha shows how cultured dairy products can enhance your baked goods.
Video.title: Cultured Dairy

Video.summary: Martha demonstrates how to incorporate ginger into your baking.
Video.title: Ginger

Video.summary: Martha presents three recipes using cocoa.
Video.title: Cocoa

Video.summary: Martha shares two standout grape recipes.
Video.title: Grapes

Video.summary: Martha shares three recipes made with shelf-stable pantry milk.
Video.title: Pantry Milks

Video.summary: Martha demonstrates how berries make everything better with three desserts.
Video.title: Berries

Video.summary: Martha introduces Arabian-inspired grilling techniques: fish in banana leaves, date-glazed lamb chops, sea bass fillets with okra kebabs, and spatchcocked saffron chicken
Video.title: Grilled Favorites

Video.summary: Lemon Good Thing, Lemon Glossary, Lemon Mousse, Making Lemon Candles, Planting Citrus in Pots, Cake of the Month: Lemon Meringue and Swiss Meringue
Video.title: Lemon Glossary, Lemon Meringue Cake

Video.summary: Portable Changing Station, Nesting Bluebird Cupcakes, Child's First Pet, Baby Food Gift Basket, Baby Recipe Card, Making Lasagna Noodles, Lasagna, Stenciling a Rocking Chair
Video.title: Lasagna, Chair Stenciling

Video.summary: Easter with Mrs. Kostyra, Cookie Tin Easter Basket, Borscht, Forced Branches for Easter, Country Cheesecake, Larry Burdick's Chocolate (Field Trip), Matryoshka Eggs
Video.title: Easter Recipes: Borscht, Country Cheesecake
